title: risqlet adversarial-review charges
description: A review panel's charges against one decision, consumed by `risqlet review`.

decision.description: The reviewed decision id (e.g. a risk id R-0003).

author.description: Id of whoever made the decision; excluded from the panel.

reviews.description: One entry per reviewer. Distinct reviewer ids; the author is not among them.

reviewer.description: Independent reviewer id (a reviewer with no charges is a clean vote).

category.description: Short slug, e.g. hollow-mitigation-test, evidence-mismatch, wrong-priority.

reproducible.description: true only if verified against the actual code/evidence; false charges do not count toward the verdict.

claim.description: The specific objection, grounded in the real file.
